notifications.name: Onboarding Request Created
notifications.subject: Onboarding started for ${u_employee_name}
notifications.body: A new onboarding request (${number}) has been created for ${u_employee_name}, joining ${u_department} on ${u_joining_date}. IT, Facilities, and Security tasks have been assigned.

notifications.name: Department Task Assigned
notifications.subject: New ${u_department_type} task: ${short_description}

notifications.name: SLA Breach Escalation
notifications.trigger: Scheduled Job: Check Overdue Lifecycle Tasks (runs hourly, calls SLAUtils.getAllBreachedTasks())
notifications.subject: OVERDUE: ${short_description}
notifications.body: This task is past its SLA due date. Please action immediately or update the request status.

notifications.name: Offboarding Complete
notifications.subject: Offboarding complete for ${u_employee_name}
notifications.body: All IT, Facilities, and Security offboarding tasks are complete for ${u_employee_name}. Access has been revoked and assets recovered.

notifications.name: Onboarding Complete
notifications.subject: Onboarding complete for ${u_employee_name}
notifications.body: ${u_employee_name} is fully provisioned and ready for Day 1. All IT, Facilities, and Security tasks are complete.
